'''ragama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bdellatomy|bdellatomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bdellatomy|bdellatomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ragama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rægæmæth|rægæmæth]] || [[word:rægæmæj|rægæmæj]] || [[word:rægæmæsh|rægæmæsh]] || [[word:rægæmæ|rægæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ragagamath|ragagamath]] || [[word:ragagamaj|ragagamaj]] || [[word:ragagamash|ragagamash]] || [[word:ragagama|ragagama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ragamath|ragamath]] || [[word:ragamaj|ragamaj]] || [[word:ragamash|ragamash]] || [[word:ragama|ragama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ragafmath|ragafmath]] || [[word:ragafmaj|ragafmaj]] || [[word:ragafmash|ragafmash]] || [[word:ragafmaf|ragafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ragamatha|ragamatha]] || [[word:ragamaja|ragamaja]] || [[word:ragamasha|ragamasha]] || [[word:ragamaka|ragamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ragamath|ragamath]] || [[word:ragamaj|ragamaj]] || [[word:ragamash|ragamash]] || [[word:ragama|ragama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ragamathal|ragamathal]] || [[word:ragamajal|ragamajal]] || [[word:ragamashal|ragamashal]] || [[word:ragamakal|ragamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ragamathatha|ragamathatha]] || [[word:ragamajaja|ragamajaja]] || [[word:ragamashasha|ragamashasha]] || [[word:ragamaka|ragamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ragamathan|ragamathan]] || [[word:ragamajan|ragamajan]] || [[word:ragamashan|ragamashan]] || [[word:ragamakan|ragamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ragamathaoro|ragamathaoro]] || [[word:ragamajaoro|ragamajaoro]] || [[word:ragamashaoro|ragamashaoro]] || [[word:ragamakaoro|ragamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
